div.p: Dear Mr. Chargé: Acting in the direction indicated by your personal note of the 28th ultimo, certified copies of the documents in the Russian and French languages, of which translations were appended to the case of the United States, together with certified copies of certain diplomatic correspondence in the English language, also appended, will go in to-morrow’s pouch for delivery to Mr. Sifton through the United States embassy at London.
I am, my dear Mr. Raikes, very truly, yours,

closer.signed:
Francis B. Loomis,
Acting Secretary of State.
